design_philosophy.core_loop: Light gun arcade action adapted for SNES controller; aim and shoot through on-rails scenarios
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Time pressure and accuracy under fire; arcade-style reflex gameplay converted to home console
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Tactical operative executing precision military operations with tactical weapon selection
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Faithful port of arcade light gun game to console without light gun peripheral (SNES Super Scope enhanced); maintains arcade difficulty and pacing philosophy while offering character/story choices distinguishing it from arcade original

difficulty.lives_system: Arcade-style lives system typical of Operation Wolf series
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Character selection offers story variant paths; Super Scope optional enhancement for precision control

progression.unlock_mechanism: Character/storyline selection branches game narrative path
replayability_hooks: Multiple character selection for different narrative experiences
Different storyline from arcade original providing story variation

faction_indicators: Military operative roles via character selection
danger_signals: Armed hostiles in on-rails combat scenarios

sources_used: tcrf - Operation Thunderbolt (SNES) - The Cutting Room Floor
data_quality_note: T3 source (empirical/qualitative) provides platform information, developer, publisher, and port-specific details only; limited gameplay mechanics documentation available in source material
